subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book on the Day of Return proclaimeth: O ye divines, know ye the measure of this Day, for this is that Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب در یوم ماب میفرماید یا احبار قدر یوم را بدانید این است آن یومیکه
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @prayer for forgiveness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
